paradigm: Mk.XII Phase 3a gemma family-internal scale (2b/9b/27b) verdict — 27b OOM-blocked
parent_axis: axis 109 (Qwen family-internal HQS-C MIXED) + axis 99 (Phase 3a 1/3 clean) + #245 next_cycle 2
fail_reason: gemma-2-27b silent crash during weight load (likely host RAM OOM kill)

gemma_2_27b.host_ram_likely_capacity_gb_est: container default ~100-120GB but inferred ≤60GB based on silent SIGKILL during from_pretrained

crash_signature.diagnosis: host-side OOM kill (SIGKILL by container memory cgroup); from_pretrained() with default device_map allocates full fp16 weight in CPU RAM before sharding to GPU

gemma_2_27b.fix_for_retry: use accelerate device_map='auto' OR HF transformers low_cpu_mem_usage=True OR explicit shard load via from_pretrained(torch_dtype=torch.float16, device_map={'':0}) with offload_folder; alternatively spawn pod with explicit memory request

HMK-A_GEMMA_SCALE_INVARIANT.decision_threshold: CONFIRMED if all 3 pairwise BBA |r| > 0.7 across (2b,9b),(9b,27b),(2b,27b)
HMK-A_GEMMA_SCALE_INVARIANT.rationale: 27b cell missing — only 1 pairwise comparison available (2b vs 9b). Cannot evaluate 3-point scale curve hypothesis with 2 cells.
HMK-A_GEMMA_SCALE_INVARIANT.partial_pairwise_2b_9b: available but per-axis BBA Pearson not computed in this verdict (would require additional analysis pass)

HMK-B_GEMMA_SCALE_BREAK.decision_threshold: CONFIRMED if any pairwise BBA |r| < 0.3 in (2b,9b),(9b,27b),(2b,27b)
HMK-B_GEMMA_SCALE_BREAK.rationale: 27b cell missing — only 1 pairwise comparison available. Cannot detect scale break at 9b→27b boundary.

HQS-C_FALSIFICATION_MIXED_BACKBONE_CONDI.decision_threshold: AMBIGUOUS if all pairwise |r| in (0.3, 0.7) → HQS-C cannot be promoted
HQS-C_FALSIFICATION_MIXED_BACKBONE_CONDI.rationale: 27b cell missing. HQS-C status from axis 109 (Qwen family-internal MIXED_BACKBONE_CONDITIONAL CONFIRMED) remains the canonical reference.

implication_mk_xii_phase_3b_70b.current_status: Cannot advance from 1/3 → 2/3 clean (gemma family scale curve incomplete due to 27b OOM)
implication_mk_xii_phase_3b_70b.70b_justification_path: BLOCKED — gemma family-internal cannot serve as 2nd clean evidence without 27b measurement
alternative_paths: Llama-3.1-8B → Llama-3.1-70B family-internal (HF gated, dancinlife unauthorized — task #6 manual)
gemma-27b retry with explicit memory-aware loading (device_map='auto', low_cpu_mem_usage=True)
Llama-3.2-1B → Llama-3.2-3B → Llama-3.1-8B small-scale family curve (Llama-3.2-1B/3B may be non-gated; Llama-3.1-8B is gated)

raw_10_caveats: 27b OOM crash silent (no traceback, no exit code, process disappeared) — diagnosis based on log size + process absence + standard from_pretrained() memory pattern; not directly captured.
Pod terminated WITHOUT retrieving any artifacts — wrapper.log was 233 bytes containing only START sentinel; HF cache (59GB downloaded) abandoned with pod.
Pre-register HMK-A/B/HQS-C all INCONCLUSIVE due to incomplete 3-point scale curve (only 2 of 3 cells measured).
gemma-2-2b and gemma-2-9b cells are REUSED from task #9 (CMT v2 5-bb retest, same v3 mode, same date) — no fresh measurement in this dispatch.
Cost cap $0.179 well under $1.00 budget — but this is not 'efficiency'; the dispatch failed with no usable 27b data, so cost-per-cell is effectively infinite for the new measurement.
next_cycle_recommendations: (high) gemma-27b retry with device_map='auto' + low_cpu_mem_usage=True (typical fix for 27B-class fp16 load on bounded-RAM containers; cost ~$0.65 same as original estimate)
(high) request RunPod template with explicit memory request (192GB+ RAM container) for 27B+ models
(medium) explore int8 quantization (bitsandbytes 8bit) for 27b — CMT measurement may be robust to mild quantization noise (~0.5% rel_std shift caveat)
(medium) Llama family-internal as alternative 2nd clean evidence path (depends on task #6 HF unblock)
